archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Technical Control Room Variant

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, functional, 1px borders, maximum screen utility)
layout_and_spacing.top_nav: h-14 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.07)] flex items-center px-4 shrink-0 bg-[#0c0c12]
layout_and_spacing.toolbar: h-12 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.07)] flex items-center px-4 shrink-0 bg-[#0c0c12]
layout_and_spacing.right_panel: w-[450px] border-l border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.07)] bg-[#13131c] flex-shrink-0 shadow-[-8px_0_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transform transition-transform

buttons.primary: bg-[#7c6dfa] text-white hover:bg-[#6b5ded] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(124,109,250,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#13131c] text-white border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.07)] hover:border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-[rgba(255,255,255,0.6)] hover:text-white hover:bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] transition-colors rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm

table.header: sticky top-0 bg-[#0c0c12] z-10 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.07)] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[rgba(255,255,255,0.5)] px-4 py-3
table.row: border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.03)] hover:bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.02)] transition-colors group cursor-pointer h-12
table.cell: px-4 py-2 align-middle text-sm whitespace-nowrap text-[rgba(255,255,255,0.8)]

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium border

score_pill.high: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-6 rounded bg-[#3dd68c]/10 text-[#3dd68c] border border-[#3dd68c]/20 font-mono text-xs font-bold
score_pill.medium: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-6 rounded bg-[#f5a623]/10 text-[#f5a623] border border-[#f5a623]/20 font-mono text-xs font-bold
score_pill.low: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-6 rounded bg-[#f05252]/10 text-[#f05252] border border-[#f05252]/20 font-mono text-xs font-bold

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'DM Sans' (weights 400, 500, 700) and 'DM Mono' (weights 400, 700) via Google Fonts in index.html.
Install `lucide-react` for clean, technical iconography suitable for a data-dense tool.

Update tailwind.config.js to extend colors with specific names like `bg-app` (#0c0c12), `surface` (#13131c), `border-subtle` (rgba(255,255,255,0.07)), etc., so standard tailwind utility classes can be seamlessly used.

Implement the Layout as a strictly full-viewport-height (h-screen) application. The global body must NOT scroll. Instead, the main deal flow table inside the container should be the ONLY element that scrolls vertically, exactly like a Bloomberg terminal or Linear app.

For the Auth Page, set the 'auth_background' image as a fixed background, with an overlay div of `bg-[#0c0c12]/80` covering it. This gives a highly professional deep grid feel without distracting the user.
The Deals Table MUST be high density: Use minimal padding (`py-2`, `px-4`), single-line text truncation, and fixed column widths where necessary.

Right-side Detail Panel: Make it 450px wide. Use conditional rendering or an off-canvas slide-in animation. It should NOT be a floating modal but rather dock to the right edge of the screen, compressing the main table.
Category mapping is strictly predefined. Ensure you map the string 'Founder pitch' to the `founder_pitch` color badge styles, 'Warm intro' to `warm_intro`, etc.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="deal-row-123"`, `data-testid="connect-gmail-btn"`).
